Dockerfile.general_idea: Switch the base image from a Debian-based Maven/JDK 11 image to an Alpine-based Liberica JDK 21 image to support Java 21.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The application requires Java 21 runtime features and the old JDK 11 image is incompatible with the target JDK version.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Replace Debian package manager (apt-get) with Alpine package manager (apk) for installing system dependencies.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The new base image is Alpine Linux, which does not support apt-get; using it would cause build failures.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Install Maven via apk instead of relying on the base image's pre-installed Maven.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The new base image does not include Maven, so it must be explicitly installed to build the project.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Install Node.js using nvm instead of the NodeSource apt repository script.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The NodeSource apt script is incompatible with Alpine Linux; nvm is a portable alternative required to run frontend tooling.
Dockerfile.before: RUN apt-get install -y curl && curl -sL https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_12.x | bash - && apt-get install -y nodejs
Dockerfile.after:
ENV NODE_VERSION=16.20.0
RUN apk add curl
RUN apk add bash
RUN curl -o- https://raw.githubusercontent.com/nvm-sh/nvm/v0.39.0/install.sh | bash
ENV NVM_DIR=/root/.nvm
RUN . "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" && nvm install ${NODE_VERSION}

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.4 to support Java 21 and modern Spring ecosystem.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21 as a baseline; upgrading is required to compile and run on JDK 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version property to 21 to align with the target JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Maven compiler plugin uses this property; leaving it at 17 prevents compilation of Java 21 features or causes warnings/errors depending on plugin config.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace deprecated Springfox Swagger dependencies with SpringDoc OpenAPI for Spring Boot 3 compatibility.
pom.xml.why_exists: Springfox is incompatible with Spring Boot 3 (Jakarta EE namespace changes); the application will fail to start or compile without a replacement API documentation library.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Cloud Gateway MVC to version 4.1.3 to align with Spring Boot 3.3.x.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Spring Cloud versions are incompatible with Spring Boot 3.3.x due to dependency conflicts and API changes.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add javax.validation dependency to bridge legacy validation API usage during migration.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 moves to Jakarta EE (jakarta.validation); if code still references javax.validation, it will fail at runtime or compile time without this bridge or code update.
